hero.title: From Raw to Perfect
hero.subtitle: As DN Holding, we are shaping the world of tomorrow with our sustainable growth and innovative vision.

about.title: Deep Roots, Strong Future
about.description: With over half a century of experience, we move forward with the vision of being a pioneer in every sector we operate.
about.description2: We continue to add value to our stakeholders with our global standard service approach and innovative mindset.

companies.title: Strength in Diversity
companies.subtitle: We offer integrated solutions with our specialized companies in various sectors.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Our completed and ongoing visionary projects.

cta.title: Let's Build the Future Together
cta.subtitle: Contact us for your projects and collaborations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading holding that guides the future with sustainable investments on a global scale.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create value by producing innovative, reliable and high quality solutions for all our stakeholders.

story.title: From Past to Present
story.subtitle: Milestones of our journey full of success.

items.title: Establishment
items.description: The foundations of our nearly half a century of experience were laid.

items.title: Export
items.description: Our first exports started to international markets, primarily the USA.

items.title: Growth and Championship
items.description: We started winning the export championship in the sector with Yaman Maden A.Ş.

items.title: Formation of DN Holding
items.description: We completed our corporate restructuring and consolidated all our activities under the umbrella of DN Holding.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: We act with transparency and honesty in all our business processes.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We support innovative approaches for continuous improvement.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: We adopt environmentally and socially sensitive sustainable policies.

companies.title: Group Companies
companies.subtitle: Our innovative companies, each an expert in their field.

areas.title: Business Areas
areas.subtitle: We create value by offering services in a wide range.

products.title: Products & Services
products.subtitle: Products and services we offer with quality and assurance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here for your questions and feedback.

info.address: DN Holding A.Ş. Honaz V.D. / 3021350358, Kaklık Mah. Mermer Fabrikaları Kümesi Küme Evleri Çetın Beton No: 8 Honaz / Denizli

common.contactCta: Would you like to get in touch?

companies.name: DN HOLDING A.Ş
companies.description: 2024 yılı itibarıyla kurumsal yapılanmasını tamamlayan ve uluslararası alanda güçlü bir pozisyona sahip olan holding.

companies.name: DN Mermer A.Ş.
companies.description: Yarım asra yaklaşan tecrübesiyle traverten ve limra taşlarında uzmanlaşmış, doğal taş sektörünün lider firması.

companies.name: Yaman Maden A.Ş.
companies.description: 2018 yılından bu yana sektörde ihracat şampiyonluğunu kesintisiz olarak sürdüren şirket.

companies.name: YMY Enerji A.Ş.
companies.description: Holdingin enerji ihtiyacını karşılayan ve yeni GES projeleriyle ülke enerjisine katkı sunan şirket.

companies.name: 4T Madencilik A.Ş.
companies.description: Doğal kaynakların ekonomiye kazandırılması amacıyla çevreye duyarlı madencilik yapar.

companies.name: HD Maden A.Ş.
companies.description: Maden sektöründe entegre üretim tesisleriyle global pazara hitap etmektedir.

companies.name: 2M Uluslararası Madencilik A.Ş.
companies.description: Sürdürülebilir madencilik faaliyetleriyle uluslararası pazarlara hizmet veren şirket.
